en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 8 – Jul 14 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged ~416 kcal/day, peaking 665 on Wednesday's 2.2 km pool intervals and 630 on Monday's repeat 2.2 km set. Friday (Jul 10) was a rest day (32 kcal); Tuesday (Jul 14) is just starting — a hack squat is planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −830 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Tuesday (Jul 14) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Monday's pool set was the week's hardest swim
en.i1: Monday's 2.2 km pool session (10×100 / 10×50, avg HR 133, max 155, 64 min) drove 819 active kcal — the biggest single-session burn of the week and the highest-intensity swim of four.
en.i2: Aerobic work came from four swims — Wednesday's 2.2 km intervals (avg HR 127) and Monday's harder 2.2 km repeat (avg HR 133), Thursday's short 0.8 km alongside the squat (avg HR 111), and Sunday's easy 1.0 km (avg HR 121). Two interval sets bookending easy volume.
en.i3t: Recovery: a softer night after a strong run
en.i3: This morning RHR ticked up to 55 and HRV eased to 40 (−5 vs the previous night, still +2 over the 38 average). Last night was 7h43 at score 79, but deep fell to 38m and awake rose to 17m — a fair night after several strong ones. Duration held; depth was thin.
en.i4: Two strength sessions this window: Thursday's squat (Garmin 59 min, avg HR 108) and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift (Garmin 49 min, avg HR 119, max 149). Neither is Hevy-logged, so there's no tonnage or set-peaks for the week; the trap-bar will fill on a later sync. Last week's hack squat (13,986 kg) has rolled out of the 7-day window.
en.rec: Tuesday opens with a hack squat (strength) on the plan. The week behind: 6 sessions across 5 active days (5h12, ~2,911 active kcal) — two Garmin-only strength sessions (Thursday's squat, Saturday's trap-bar deadlift) plus four pool swims (2.2 km interval sets Wednesday and Monday, a short 0.8 km, and Sunday's easy 1 km). Only Friday was a full rest day. Recovery softened overnight: RHR 55 and HRV 40 off a fair 7h43 at score 79, with thin deep sleep — fine to train but keep the warm-up thorough. Next: hack squat today, swim intervals Wednesday, squat Thursday.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-08 → 2026-07-14 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 2 snage · 4 plivanja · samo Garmin (nema Hevy volumena)
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 8.7. – 14.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. ~416 kcal/dan, vrhunac 665 na srijedinim bazenskim intervalima 2,2 km i 630 na ponedjeljkovom ponovljenom setu 2,2 km. Petak (10.7.) bio je dan odmora (32 kcal); utorak (14.7.) tek počinje — planiran hack squat.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −830 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Utorak (14.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Ponedjeljkov bazenski set bio je najteže plivanje tjedna
hr.i1: Ponedjeljkovo plivanje 2,2 km (10×100 / 10×50, prosj. puls 133, maks 155, 64 min) donijelo je 819 aktivnih kcal — najveća potrošnja pojedinačnog treninga u tjednu i plivanje najvišeg intenziteta među četiri.
hr.i2: Aerobni rad došao je iz četiri plivanja — srijedinih intervala 2,2 km (prosj. puls 127) i ponedjeljkova težeg ponovljenog 2,2 km (prosj. puls 133), četvrtkovog kratkog 0,8 km uz čučanj (prosj. puls 111) i nedjeljnog laganog 1,0 km (prosj. puls 121). Dva intervalna seta koja uokviruju laganu volumenu.
hr.i3t: Oporavak: mekša noć nakon snažnog niza
hr.i3: Jutros je RHR porastao na 55, a HRV se smirio na 40 (−5 vs prethodna noć, ipak +2 iznad prosjeka od 38). Sinoć 7h43 uz ocjenu 79, ali duboki san pao je na 38m, a budnost porasla na 17m — osrednja noć nakon nekoliko snažnih. Trajanje je zadržano; dubina je bila tanka.
hr.i4t: Snaga: dva treninga samo u Garminu
hr.i4: Dva treninga snage ovog razdoblja: četvrtkov čučanj (Garmin 59 min, prosj. puls 108) i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje (Garmin 49 min, prosj. puls 119, maks 149). Nijedan nije zabilježen u Hevyju, pa nema tonaže ni vrhova serija za tjedan; trap-bar će se popuniti pri kasnijoj sinkronizaciji. Prošlotjedni hack squat (13.986 kg) izašao je iz 7-dnevnog prozora.
hr.rec: Utorak počinje hack squatom (snaga) po planu. Tjedan iza: 6 treninga kroz 5 aktivnih dana (5h12, ~2.911 aktivnih kcal) — dva treninga snage samo u Garminu (četvrtkov čučanj, subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje) plus četiri bazenska plivanja (intervalni setovi 2,2 km u srijedu i ponedjeljak, kratkih 0,8 km i nedjeljnih laganih 1 km). Samo je petak bio potpuni dan odmora. Oporavak je omekšao preko noći: RHR 55 i HRV 40 nakon osrednjih 7h43 uz ocjenu 79, uz tanak duboki san — u redu za trening, ali temeljito se zagrij. Sljedeće: hack squat danas, intervali u srijedu, čučanj u četvrtak.
hr.foot: Podaci: 8.7. → 14.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
